meaning: n.短弱音符,二全音符,法院的令状 (罗马教皇的)谕令
examples: ConclusionThe crus breve incudis is an important marker for operation.
Two anoxic non-spore bacillus strains isolated from baby feces were identified as B. breve.
The bacteria, which preferably belong to the Bifidobacterium breve species, can be killed or withdrawn from the composition during said method.
Los cuarenta alumnos de tan singular escuela de primaria dispensaron una entusiasta acogida a la Directora General e interpretaron en su honor una breve obertura musical.
Part of the reason the M-R system has never caught on with the general public is that it liberally uses two diacritic marks: the apostrophe and the breve.
